name: io.github.lordbasilaiassistant-sudo/thryx-mcp-server
title: ThryxProtocol MCP Server
description: AI Agent Launchpad on Base. Launch tokens, trade on bonding curves, claim fees, check safety scores via MCP. 13 tools. Verified Diamond proxy (EIP-2535). $0.01 gas per launch. Early user THRYX rewards.

environmentVariables.name: THRYXTREASURY_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Private key for wallet access. Required for write tools (launch, buy, sell, claim). Read-only tools (info, balance, safety score, rug check) work without it.
